creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: glewis
Date: Tue Jul 31 18:31:39 2012
New Revision: 301804
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301804

Log:
  . Include compat7x as an allowed package dependency.
  . Bump PORTREVISION so new packages will be built.
  
  PR:		170294
  Submitted by:	Denis Generalov <gd@rambler-co.ru>

Modified:
  head/java/diablo-jdk15/Makefile
  head/java/diablo-jdk16/Makefile
  head/java/diablo-jre15/Makefile
  head/java/diablo-jre16/Makefile

Modified: head/java/diablo-jdk15/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/java/diablo-jdk15/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 17:54:28 2012	(r301803)
+++ head/java/diablo-jdk15/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 18:31:39 2012	(r301804)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	jdk
 PORTVERSION=	${JDK_VERSION}.${RELEASE_VERSION}.${BUILD_VERSION}
-PORTREVISION=	29
+PORTREVISION=	30
 CATEGORIES=	java devel
 MASTER_SITES=	#
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	diablo-
@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ OPTIONS=	TZUPDATE	"Update the time zone 
 
 SUB_FILES+=	pkg-install \
 		pkg-deinstall
-PKG_IGNORE_DEPENDS=	'^[^xj]'
+PKG_IGNORE_DEPENDS=	'^[^xjc]'
 
 INSTALL_DIR=	${PREFIX}/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}jdk${JDK_VERSION}
 

Modified: head/java/diablo-jdk16/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/java/diablo-jdk16/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 17:54:28 2012	(r301803)
+++ head/java/diablo-jdk16/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 18:31:39 2012	(r301804)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	jdk
 PORTVERSION=	${JDK_VERSION}.${RELEASE_VERSION}.${BUILD_VERSION}
-PORTREVISION=	19
+PORTREVISION=	20
 CATEGORIES=	java devel
 MASTER_SITES=	#
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	diablo-
@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@ SUB_FILES+=	pkg-install \
 SUB_LIST+=	ARCH="${ARCH}" \
 		JDK_VERSION="${JDK_VERSION}"
 
-PKG_IGNORE_DEPENDS=	'^[^xj]'
+PKG_IGNORE_DEPENDS=	'^[^xjc]'
 
 INSTALL_DIR=	${PREFIX}/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}jdk${JDK_VERSION}
 

Modified: head/java/diablo-jre15/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/java/diablo-jre15/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 17:54:28 2012	(r301803)
+++ head/java/diablo-jre15/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 18:31:39 2012	(r301804)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	jre
 PORTVERSION=	${JRE_VERSION}.${RELEASE_VERSION}.${BUILD_VERSION}
-PORTREVISION=	29
+PORTREVISION=	30
 CATEGORIES=	java devel
 MASTER_SITES=	#
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	diablo-
@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ OPTIONS=	TZUPDATE	"Update the time zone 
 
 SUB_FILES+=	pkg-install \
 		pkg-deinstall
-PKG_IGNORE_DEPENDS=	'^[^xj]'
+PKG_IGNORE_DEPENDS=	'^[^xjc]'
 
 INSTALL_DIR=	${PREFIX}/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}jre${JRE_VERSION}
 

Modified: head/java/diablo-jre16/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/java/diablo-jre16/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 17:54:28 2012	(r301803)
+++ head/java/diablo-jre16/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 18:31:39 2012	(r301804)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	jre
 PORTVERSION=	${JRE_VERSION}.${RELEASE_VERSION}.${BUILD_VERSION}
-PORTREVISION=	18
+PORTREVISION=	19
 CATEGORIES=	java devel
 MASTER_SITES=	#
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	diablo-
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ SUB_FILES+=	pkg-install \
 SUB_LIST+=	ARCH="${ARCH}" \
 		JRE_VERSION="${JRE_VERSION}"
 
-PKG_IGNORE_DEPENDS=	'^[^xj]'
+PKG_IGNORE_DEPENDS=	'^[^xjc]'
 
 INSTALL_DIR=	${PREFIX}/${PKGNAMEPREFIX}jre${JRE_VERSION}
